calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-28-2014 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2014 Continued To Mar-19-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Transfer Action To San Diego County; And For Pymt By Pltf'S Councel Of Def'S Expenses And Attny'S Fees Incurred
Off Calendar Nov-25-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOSEPH C. GRATZ, TEL. NO. 362-6666 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JULIAN MCMILLAN, TEL. NO. (619) 464-1500 EXT. 14 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS MCMILLIAN LAW GROUP INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION and JULIAN MCMILLIAN's motion To Transfer Action To San Diego County; And For Payment By Plaintiff's Counsel Of Defendant'S Expenses And Attorneys Fees Incurred is Granted. Venue is transferred to San Diego County pursuant to CCP 395(a) and Plaintiff's non-opposition. Plaintiff shall pay Defendant reasonable fees and costs in bringing this motion in the amount of $ 4,967.50 pursuant to CCP 396b(b). Plaintiff unreasonably denied Defendants' request for a transfer of venue on September 23, 2013. Plaintiff did not agree to stipulate to a transfer until after Defendant filed this motion and already incurred the fees and costs associated with preparing and filing this motion. Plaintiff should have known San Francisco was not a proper venue. The Complaint pleads that Defendants reside in San Diego. (Complaint, 6-8.) The contract does not specify San Francisco as the location of performance. (CCP 395(a).) Plaintiff has cited no case that establishes that a physical injury occurs for venue purposes at a website's headquarters when the operation of a website or the website is injured. A venue selection provision in a contract will not be enforced when there is no statutory basis for that venue. (Battaglia Ent., Inc. v. Super. Ct. (2013) 215 Cal.App.4th 309, 317.) (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/ehg
